environment_variables.name: PATH
environment_variables.purpose: Executable discovery path for Python, Node, SMT solvers, and proof assistants.

environment_variables.name: PYTHONPATH
environment_variables.purpose: Repository import path used by the security verification validation commands.

environment_variables.name: JAVA_HOME
environment_variables.purpose: JVM root used by Apalache and related model-checking tools when installed.

environment_variables.name: Z3_EXE
environment_variables.purpose: Explicit Z3 executable override for reproducible proof runners.

environment_variables.name: CVC5_EXE
environment_variables.purpose: Explicit CVC5 executable override for differential SMT runners.

environment_variables.name: APALACHE_EXE
environment_variables.purpose: Explicit Apalache executable override for TLA+ model checking.

environment_variables.name: TAMARIN_EXE
environment_variables.purpose: Explicit Tamarin executable override for protocol proofs.

environment_variables.name: PROVERIF_EXE
environment_variables.purpose: Explicit ProVerif executable override for protocol proofs.

environment_variables.name: LEAN_EXE
environment_variables.purpose: Explicit Lean executable override for proof-assistant checks.

environment_variables.name: COQC_EXE
environment_variables.purpose: Explicit Coq compiler override for proof-assistant checks.

environment_variables.name: COQPATH
environment_variables.purpose: Additional Coq library search path for proof-consumer checks.

environment_variables.name: LEAN_PATH
environment_variables.purpose: Additional Lean library search path for proof-consumer checks.
